message:
🐛 Fix ChartVisualization test failure from LazyEChart Suspense (#10156)

The first test in ChartVisualization.test.tsx fails because LazyEChart
uses React.lazy + Suspense. On the first render, the lazy module hasn't
resolved yet, so the Suspense fallback (skeleton) is shown instead of
the mocked echarts component. Subsequent tests pass because the module
is cached.

Fix: make the first test async and use findByTestId to wait for the
Suspense boundary to resolve before asserting.

Fixes #10153

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
